text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fascinating! Truly fascinating! To think I'd come
this far to have my research refuted!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do some thinking! Based on the
results...
choice_data_list: Take your time and think it through.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What?! I may be excited but that doesn't mean
I'm panicking!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, I should calm myself. I can't come to
make sound decisions if my head's not clear.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
There's time. We surely have time left. Best to
make the most of it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh. I swear, I will certainly overcome this
obstacle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Come now! There is value in worrying!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This failure will serve as fuel to search for a way
forward!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My research up till now hasn't all been for naught.
I'm sure the answer is hidden in there somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Listen to me, Trainer. I will find the answer!
